blended.narrative: Big Sky is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,172 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.9" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 52".
